description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:stable Docker image with a docker:dind service and sets the variables DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2 and DOCKER_HOST to tcp://docker:2375. Define a single stage named build and add a job called build in that stage that executes the exact shell command `docker build -t gnar-base .`. The pipeline does not define any caches, artifacts, or special rules, so the job runs on every pipeline execution.
